Custom Hoodie Manufacturing in Pakistan from 50 Pieces

July 1, 2026 | By FABRIOZA

The hoodie is the most versatile garment in modern fashion — worn by athletes, streetwear enthusiasts, corporate teams, and luxury brands alike. At FABRIOZA, we manufacture custom hoodies from 50 pieces per style with your choice of fabric weight, construction, and customization technique. ISO 9001 certified, factory-direct from Pakistan.

Understanding Hoodie GSM Weights

GSM (grams per square meter) determines a hoodie's weight, warmth, and feel. Choosing the right GSM is crucial for your brand positioning:

GSMWeightBest ForSeason
280gsmLightweightGym wear, layering, warm climatesSpring/Summer
320gsmMid-WeightRetail brands, all-purposeAll seasons
360gsmHeavyweightPremium streetwear, warmthFall/Winter
400gsmUltra-HeavyweightLuxury brands, oversized fitsWinter

Fabric Options for Custom Hoodies

French Terry

Smooth outer face with looped inner texture. Breathable, less bulky than fleece. Ideal for 280-320gsm lightweight and mid-weight hoodies.

Brushed Fleece

Soft, fuzzy interior created by brushing the fabric. Warmer and cozier than French terry. The standard for 320-400gsm hoodies.

Cotton-Poly Blends

80/20 or 70/30 cotton-polyester mixes offer better shape retention, less shrinkage, and easier care than 100% cotton. Most popular for retail brands.

100% Cotton

Natural, breathable, and biodegradable. Ringspun cotton offers extra softness. Best for premium brands focused on natural materials.

Customization Techniques for Hoodies

3D Puff Embroidery

Raised, textured logos that feel premium and last forever. Best placement: chest, sleeve, or hood. Works on all GSM weights but shows best on 320gsm+.

Flat Embroidery

Classic, clean logo application. Lower profile than puff embroidery. Ideal for subtle branding on premium hoodies.

Screen Printing

Water-based inks for soft-hand prints. Plastisol for vibrant, opaque colors. Discharge printing for vintage effects on dark garments.

Puff Print

The streetwear essential — raised ink creating a 3D texture. Perfect for bold graphics on heavyweight hoodies.

Woven Patches

Sewn-on patches with intricate detail. Can be any shape. Popular for vintage/workwear aesthetics.

Hoodie Styles Available

  • Pullover: Classic kangaroo pocket, drawstring hood
  • Full-Zip: Versatile layering piece
  • Quarter-Zip: Athletic/casual hybrid
  • Crop: Trending women's fit, raw hem
  • Oversized/Boxy: Dropped shoulders, extended body
  • Athletic: Slim fit, performance fabrics

Pieces MOQ

Per Unit

Construction Details That Matter

Our hoodies feature: double-needle stitching at all stress points, reinforced neck seams to prevent stretching, metal-tipped flat drawstrings (or custom aglets), ribbed cuffs and hem that retain elasticity, and pre-shrunk fabric (max 5% shrinkage). These details separate premium hoodies from cheap blanks.

Manufacture Your Custom Hoodie Line

50 pieces minimum. Any GSM. Any customization. Free quote in 24 hours.
